name: Massachusetts Institute of Technology
meets_full_need_notes: MIT meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted students, domestic and international. Families earning under $75,000 typically pay nothing.
no_loan_notes: MIT eliminated loans from all financial aid packages. All MIT scholarships are grants. No loans in institutional packages. Families earning under $75,000 pay nothing; under $140,000 pay nothing tuition.
ed_aid_implications: MIT does not offer ED. REA applicants receive same need-based financial aid as regular decision. Aid is released with REA admission decision.
appeal_policy: MIT reviews appeals for changed financial circumstances through the Student Financial Services office. Professional judgment applied for significant changes in family finances.
